subcodes.first_line: O Physician! In these days when carnal desires have caused some to stray from justice and equity and from that which hath been revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طبیبی در این ایام که هواهای نفسانیه بعضی را از عدل و انصاف و ما نزل فی
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @exhortations and counsels, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @contention and conflict, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
